overview: Premium website for Team Lycaura, a student Formula 1 team competing in F1 in Schools. Features a dark futuristic design with neon accents, interactive 3D car viewer, team showcase, sponsors section, and contact form.
features: Interactive 3D F1 car model with rotate and zoom
Dark theme with deep purple, neon blue, and silver accents
Team members grid with hover animations
Fully responsive mobile and desktop layout
